treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted with worsening abdominal pain.
Started on hyoscyamine for crampy abdominal pain.
Recommended continuation of senna and miralax as needed for bowel movements.
Advised to stop taking diabetes medication Ozempic due to associated abdominal pain.

patient_outcome.final_status: Ambulatory - Independent, clear and coherent mental status.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with all appointments as detailed in discharge instructions.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Symptoms may improve with more regular bowel movements and management of IBS.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient's abdominal pain suspected to be related to IBS, potentially exacerbated by stress.
